name: openpocket-phone
description: Control OpenPocket Android emulator and physical-phone targets from Codex through local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Control Android phones and emulators through OpenPocket
interface.longDescription: OpenPocket Phone gives Codex a local phone-use surface for Android emulator and physical-phone targets. It uses OpenPocket's ADB runtime for screenshots, UI metadata, taps, swipes, text input, app launch, and target status without relying on desktop Computer Use.
defaultPrompt: Use OpenPocket to inspect my Android target
Drive this Android app through OpenPocket
Check whether my phone target is ready
